parameters.description: Send notifications to your own SimplePush destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise spush:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channel skips Apprise and POSTs a native SimplePush JSON payload directly to the SimplePush API.
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"key":"${ customer_secrets.SIMPLEPUSH_APIKEY }","msg":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to SimplePush API (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment SimplePush destinations, direct

apikey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's SimplePush apikey
